message:
feat: Implement typeobject.zig TODO stubs with real functionality

- type_getattro: Lookup in tp_dict using PyDict_GetItem, handle descriptors
- type_setattro: Set/delete in tp_dict using PyDict_SetItem/DelItem
- PyType_IsSubtype: Search MRO tuple for subtype relationship
- PyType_GetModuleState: Call PyModule_GetState on type's module
- PyType_Modified: Recursively invalidate tp_version_tag for subtypes
  using tp_subclasses dict with weakref traversal

Reduces TODO count from 23 to 18 (5 eliminated).
